opinion.h: CRASKA, ALIAS DAVIS, v. NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 877. Decided June 12, 1961.
opinion.p: Louis J. Lefkowitz, Attorney General of New York, and Robert E. Fischer, Special Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h: CERVIERI v. PORT OF NEW YORK AUTHORITY, 367 U.S. 487 (1961)
opinion.p: 367 U.S. 487 CERVIERI ET UX. v. PORT OF NEW YORK AUTHORITY. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 886. Decided June 12, 1961.
Sidney Goldstein and Russell E. Watson for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
